Stage 1 Outreach: CEPT University

Strategic Execution for Gujarat's Institutional Landmarks.

Hi Barjor,

Under your leadership, CEPT continues to define the architectural discourse in India. As Ahmedabad pivots toward massive vertical and institutional transformation, Vitan offers 35 years of 'Ahmedabad Intimacy.' We see a strategic alignment in translating high-level urban research into executable, performance-led landmarks.

Vitan Architects views institutional design as a commitment to Operational Survival. Our 35 years in Ahmedabad have proven that great design must be backed by technical mastery to ensure landmarks remain vibrant and high-performing for generations.

Vitan Reference: Ahmedabad Racquet Academy
An institutional sports facility reference for conversations that need community use, activity planning, and operational clarity.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how Vitan can support CEPT’s upcoming initiatives.
